sigWerErrors.reason: Omitting 'es' at the start slightly changes the sentence structure but does not affect the overall meaning.
Omitting 'pues' (a discourse marker) does not change the factual content or meaning of the sentence.
The expected phrase 'no no sé cuál es' (I don't know which it is) becomes 'no se cual es' (does not know which it is), which changes the subject and meaning of the sentence.
Omitting 'cuál' (which) makes the sentence incomplete and unclear, significantly affecting the meaning.
